name: Garlic Croutons with Thyme
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Bread, white, cut into 1/2-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the cut side of a small heavy skillet with the halved garlic.
2. Add butter to the skillet and cook over moderately low heat for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the garlic is golden.
3. Discard the garlic from the skillet.
4. Add bread cubes and thyme.
5. Cook croutons by tossing them until lightly toasted.
6. Sprinkle with salt to taste and drain on paper towels.
Makes about a cup.
